description: Letter from Yosef Binyamin, in Rashīd, to Shemuel Samḥūn(?), in Fustat/Cairo. A certain Yiṣḥaq adds a postscript with his greetings. In Judaeo-Arabic. Dating: Probably 18th or 19th century. The writer reports that he arrived in Rashīd. Mentions various business matters. Regards to Moshe; Eliyya; Moshe Ḥefeẓ; and Yiṣḥaq Shami.
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
